raw: 25 Evans Way Boston, MA 02115 617-566-1401 Get Directions Visit museum website for more information. This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass provides up to 4 people with $5.00 admission per person, redeemable at the admission desk. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. This pass has been provided by a generous contribution from the South Shore Ladies Club. Check Dates Massachusetts State Parks Learn More

source_phrases.free_under_age: Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free
